description: A player was charged for an in-game item but never received it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the player's account and purchase history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the player and the specific failed transaction.

nodes.task_description: Verify the payment was successful with the payment provider but the item was not delivered in-game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the payment was processed but the item entitlement failed.

nodes.task_description: Manually grant the purchased item to the player's in-game inventory.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the item to the player's account.
